Phase-15.NAME: Automated RU IP Range Updates
Phase-15.goal: Automatically keep ru_ips ipset current from 3 public sources with fallback, validation, and atomic swap.
Phase-15.step-1: M-017: Create RuIpsetUpdater class — multi-source fetch, parse, validate, dedup — DONE
Phase-15.step-2: M-017: Implement incremental ipset diff + atomic swap (not flush+rebuild) — DONE
Phase-15.step-3: M-017: Last-known-good persistence + rollback on failure — DONE
Phase-15.step-4: M-008: Update APScheduler interval from 24h to 6h — DONE
Phase-15.step-5: M-017: Add admin endpoint GET /routing/ru-ipset-stats — DONE
Phase-15.step-6: M-012: Deploy — create /var/lib/krotpn/ directory + host script — DONE
Phase-15.step-7: M-017: Write unit tests for RuIpsetUpdater (mocked HTTP) — DONE
Phase-15.step-8: M-017: Write integration tests (mocked subprocess for ipset) — DONE via live host script
Phase-15.step-9: M-017: Update GRACE docs — M-017.xml, V-M-017.xml, graph-index — DONE
Phase-15.live-verification: ipverse: 8588 entries. yandex.ru IN set, google.com NOT IN set. Cron every 6h.
Phase-15.data-flows: Phase-15: auto RU IP update (new flow)
